questionHtml:
What allows to conclude that viruses might have evolved from cells?      


I.  Some viruses and eukaryotic cells have enzymes to synthesize DNA from RNA.    

II.  Some viruses have an envelop made of phospholipids, same as cell membranes.   

III.  Some viruses have similar genetic material to parasitic bacteria.  


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III
